title: pillowy venezuelan paprika wrap
description: cultural venezuelan dish featuring pillowy paprika-spiced tofu, wrapped in a crispy ssam-wrap, served with a side of salsa criolla

ingredients.name: paprika
ingredients.notes: smoked paprika for added depth of flavor

instructions: preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat
add the chopped onion and sauté until caramelized, about 5 minutes
add the minced garlic and sauté for an additional minute, until fragrant
add the smoked paprika and toasted cumin, stir to combine
add the tofu and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side
warm the ssam-wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds
assemble the wraps by placing the cooked tofu in the center and topping with the sautéed onion mixture, thyme, oregano, and salt
serve immediately with a side of salsa criolla
